evidence_summary: The polling place is Germanov Community Center. OSM way 372749421 is named מתנ"ס גרמנוב and its entire footprint is in statistical area 35.
review_notes: Three OSM address points use גיבורי החיל 1; the named polling-place footprint disambiguates them.

evidence_summary: OSM building 132600339 (Herzl School) has 98.1330% of its footprint in statistical area 511; centroid and representative point are also in 511.
review_notes: The remaining 1.8670% is a boundary sliver in area 525.

evidence_summary: OSM building 235168616 (HaMeginim School) crosses areas 141 and 146; 55.3597% of its footprint and its representative point are in 146.
review_notes: This is a convention for a genuinely boundary-crossing building, not a claim that its whole footprint is in 146.

evidence_summary: The official planning coordinate for הרב קוק 13 is about 11 m from OSM building 109507055 in statistical area 322 and about 50 m from the conflicting point in area 321.
review_notes: The source place is Gan Chabad, whose official municipal address is הרב קוק 13.

evidence_summary: OSM building 462128055 (Itamar School) crosses areas 713, 722 and 723; 65.8186% of its footprint and its representative point are in 722.
review_notes: This is a convention for a genuinely boundary-crossing building, not a claim that its whole footprint is in 722.

evidence_summary: OSM building 370029398 (Makif Alef High School) has 98.7263% of its footprint in statistical area 634; centroid and representative point are also in 634.
review_notes: The remaining 1.2737% is a boundary sliver in area 632.

evidence_summary: Official council and library sources place הברוש 13 in עץ אפרים, which has one 2022 statistical area.
review_notes: No exact OSM address feature was found; this is an official-address fallback to the correct component locality.

evidence_summary: Address directories place הערבה 2 and the community Mifal HaPais club in עץ אפרים, which has one 2022 statistical area.
review_notes: No exact OSM address feature was found; this is a reviewed component-locality fallback.

evidence_summary: OSM node 2384007260 is house 25 on זנגוויל and its point is inside Jerusalem statistical area 1124.
review_notes: Election sources spell the street זנגויל with one vav; OSM spells the same Jerusalem street זנגוויל with two.
